ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "x_coordinate" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the node */,
  "y_coordinate" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., sensor node, relay node, gateway node) */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Current battery level of the node */,
  "last_seen" INTEGER /* Last time the node was seen or heard from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission event */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node */,
  "destination_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination node */,
  "transmission_time" INTEGER /* Time of transmission */,
  "packet_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the packet */,
  "hop_count" INTEGER /* Number of hops the packet took */,
  "packet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet */,
  "packet_type" TEXT /* Type of packet (e.g., data packet, control packet) */,
  "retransmission_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the packet was retransmitted */,
  "latency" INTEGER /* Latency of the transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmissions_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmissions_destination_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission event */,
  "priority_value" INTEGER /* Value of the priority */,
  "priority_type" TEXT /* Type of priority (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "priority_description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_priorities_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hop_counts" (
  "hop_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hop count */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission event */,
  "hop_count_value" INTEGER /* Value of the hop count */,
  "hop_path" TEXT /* Path taken by the packet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hop_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hop_counts_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receivers" (
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receiver */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "receiver_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the receiver */,
  "receiver_status" TEXT /* Status of the receiver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receiver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receivers_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "senders" (
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sender */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "sender_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the sender */,
  "sender_status" TEXT /* Status of the sender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senders_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "x_coordinate" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the destination */,
  "y_coordinate" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the destination */,
  "destination_type" TEXT /* Type of destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destinations_x_coordinate FOREIGN KEY ("x_coordinate") REFERENCES nodes ("x_coordinate")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_types" (
  "transmission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission event */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., data, control) */,
  "transmission_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_types_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_recoveries" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet recovery */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission event */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Time of packet recovery */,
  "recovery_reason" TEXT /* Reason for packet recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_recoveries_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission event */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., packet loss, latency) */,
  "statistic_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_statistics_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id")
)
column_names: Type of node (e.g., sensor node, relay node, gateway node)
